title: kalanchoe lateritia var. prostrata
intro: Kalanchoe lateritia var. prostrata, also known as the dwarf or creeping Kalanchoe, is a succulent plant species that is a variety of the Kalanchoe lateritia plant. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Kalanchoe lateritia var. prostrata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
